searchSpaceId.title: Search Space ID
searchSpaceId.description: Required canonical crawl configuration. The actor resolves start URLs and crawl defaults from the checked-in search-space definition.

maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Optional override for the search-space default maximum number of job ads to process.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Optional override for the search-space default maximum number of parallel browser tasks.

maxRequestsPerMinute.title: Max Requests Per Minute
maxRequestsPerMinute.description: Optional override for the search-space default rate limit.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional proxy override. If omitted, the search-space default proxy setting is used.

allowInactiveMarkingOnPartialRuns.title: Allow Inactive Marking On Partial Runs
allowInactiveMarkingOnPartialRuns.description: Optional override of the search-space reconciliation rule for partial runs.
